errors.description: The audience in the token is invalid and is no longer supported in Partner Center API.
causes: Token requested with the retired graph.windows.net audience
errors.remediation: Request the token with resource https://api.partnercenter.microsoft.com (see the deprecate-azure-active-directory-graph-token guidance).

errors.description: This resource doesn't support application-only authentication.
causes: Called an app+user-only operation with an app-only token
errors.remediation: Acquire an App+User (secure application model) token for this scenario; check the scenario's authType before calling.

errors.description: Insufficient privileges to complete the operation.
causes: The signed-in user lacks the required GDAP role or Partner Center role
errors.remediation: Grant the calling user the required GDAP/role (e.g. User Administrator, Directory Writers) via the customer's GDAP relationship and AdminAgents membership.

errors.description: Access has been blocked by Conditional Access policies. The access policy doesn't allow token issuance.
causes: A Conditional Access policy in the tenant blocked the token
errors.remediation: Adjust the Conditional Access policy (users/groups scope) or sign in from a compliant context.

errors.description: Partner token isn't allowed in license management calls. Call with partner access token.
causes: Wrong token type used for license management
errors.remediation: Use the correct partner access token for license operations.

errors.description: Microsoft Entra returned an error during token issuance.
causes: Entra sign-in / consent / MFA problem
errors.remediation: See the Microsoft Entra error-codes reference for the specific sub-error and mitigation steps.

errors.description: The PLA ID (formerly MPN ID) is not linked to an active CSP indirect reseller tenant.
causes: Reseller not enrolled as an indirect reseller
errors.remediation: Have the reseller enroll into the CSP program as an indirect reseller in Partner Center.

errors.description: This customer tenant has exceeded the limit for the number of subscriptions.
causes: Subscription count over the Entra limit
errors.remediation: Consolidate subscriptions per the Partner Center documentation.

errors.description: This customer account is locked for transactions.
causes: Account locked
errors.remediation: Contact Partner Center support.

errors.description: Your customer account wasn't approved. Transactions for this customer aren't allowed.
causes: Customer account failed review/approval
errors.remediation: Verify the customer account information is correct and complete the review process before transacting.

errors.description: Subscription quantity can't be increased or decreased while subscription is being suspended.
causes: Quantity change attempted on a suspending subscription
errors.remediation: Wait until the subscription reaches a stable state before changing quantity.

errors.description: Subscription quantity isn't within minimum and maximum allowed quantity.
causes: Requested seat count out of the offer's allowed range
errors.remediation: Send a quantity within the offer's min/max seat limits.

errors.description: The billing cycle for an existing subscription can't be updated using update-subscription. Use update-Order operation.
causes: Tried to change billingCycle via update-subscription
errors.remediation: Change the billing cycle with the update-order operation instead of update-subscription.

errors.description: Etag is no longer valid.
causes: The resource changed since you last read it (stale ETag)
errors.remediation: GET the resource again to get the current ETag, then retry the update.

errors.description: Subscription quantity can't be decreased.
causes: Seat reduction outside the allowed window for new commerce
errors.remediation: New commerce seat reductions are only allowed within 7 days of purchase/renewal; otherwise reduce at the next renewal.

errors.description: Can't update a subscription with suspended status.
causes: Update attempted on a suspended subscription
errors.remediation: Reactivate the subscription (status active) before updating it.

errors.description: The subscription isn't eligible to be autorenewed.
causes: AutoRenew toggled on an ineligible offer
errors.remediation: Confirm the offer supports auto-renew before setting autoRenewEnabled.

errors.description: There's a pending operation on this subscription. Try again after 24 hours.
causes: A previous async operation on the subscription is still in progress
errors.remediation: Wait for the pending operation to finish (up to 24h) before retrying.

errors.description: Update operations are no longer allowed for this subscription.
causes: Subscription is in a terminal/expired state
errors.remediation: No further updates are possible; purchase a new subscription if needed.

errors.description: This subscription has been updated too many times. Contact partner support if you need to make more updates.
causes: Per-subscription update limit reached
errors.remediation: Batch your changes; contact partner support if more updates are required.

errors.description: The offer isn't eligible for purchase.
causes: Offer not available to this partner/customer/segment
errors.remediation: Re-check the catalog (get-products / get-sku-availabilities) for an eligible offer and segment.

errors.description: Offer isn't available in the specified country/region.
causes: Offer not sold in the customer's market
errors.remediation: Use an offer/availability valid for the customer's country.

errors.description: A partner confirmation of the customer's acceptance of the Microsoft Customer Agreement must be provided, or the customer must accept it in the admin center, before completing this purchase.
causes: Microsoft Customer Agreement (MCA) not confirmed for the customer
errors.remediation: Confirm customer MCA acceptance (attestation) before purchasing.

errors.description: CatalogItemId requires attestation acceptance.
causes: Offer requires attestation that was not accepted
errors.remediation: Set AttestationAccepted on the cart line item for this catalog item.

errors.description: Partner Attestation is missing.
causes: Required partner attestation not provided on the order
errors.remediation: Provide PartnerOnRecordAttestationAccepted on the cart before checkout.

errors.description: Order ID not found.
causes: Wrong order id, or up to 15-minute propagation delay after submission
errors.remediation: Verify the order id; allow up to 15 minutes after checkout before the order is queryable.

errors.description: Subscription can't be migrated to New Commerce because the status isn't active.
causes: Legacy subscription not active
errors.remediation: Only active subscriptions can be migrated; reactivate or wait until active.

errors.description: Subscription can't be migrated to New Commerce because it's less than 24 hours from the term end.
causes: Migration attempted too close to term end
errors.remediation: Migrate earlier in the term, or let it renew and migrate afterward.

errors.description: Subscription can't be migrated to New Commerce because it has add-ons.
causes: Add-ons must migrate as a bundle
errors.remediation: Include the add-ons as a flat addOnMigrations list so the base + add-ons migrate together.

errors.description: This transfer request can't be initiated as the customer has legacy Azure subscriptions.
causes: Legacy Azure subscriptions block the transfer
errors.remediation: Transition the customer to the Azure plan, or exclude legacy Azure subscriptions from the transfer.

errors.description: Transfer of billing ownership can't be completed because Azure reservations don't transfer with subscriptions.
causes: Azure reservations present in the transfer selection
errors.remediation: Cancel the Azure reservations associated with the subscriptions, then retry the transfer.

errors.description: Tenant not found.
causes: Wrong customer tenant id, or partner has no relationship with the tenant
errors.remediation: Verify the customer-tenant-id (Microsoft ID) and that a valid partner relationship/GDAP exists.
